-- 5 of 51 --

Your Role In A Nutshell
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 51 --

Protect the Business.
Protect the Entrepreneur.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 51 --

● Eliminate distractions
○ Personnel issues
○ Menial tasks
○ Unnecessary meetings / emails
○ Member complaints/conflicts
● Allow them to focus on what they’re good at - Sales?
Marketing? PICK 1-2
● Lighten their load every chance you get → PULL from
them
PROTECT THEIR TIME & ATTENTIONwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 51 --

OPERATOR
“The Brakes”
● Accountable for implementation
● Liaise between Entrepreneur and
rest of the company
● Establish policies, systems &
frameworks
● Risk management & evaluation →
the “how”
● Break beliefs, push limits &
demand more
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
ENTREPRENEUR
“The Gas”
● Design the business strategy/vision
● Act as the “face” of the company
● Stay on top of trends, changes in
the market & new opportunities
● Continuously sell the company
culture, vision & the “why”
● Break beliefs, push limits &
demand more
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 51 --

“Accountable for
implementation”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 51 --

GOAL SETTING
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 51 --

1. Define the “What” & “Why” → What is the result you want to
achieve and why is it important?
GOAL SETTINGwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 51 --

1. Define the “What” & “Why” → What is the result you want to
achieve and why is it important?
2. Identify the “Who” → What resources will you need to
bring this to life? (internal or external)
GOAL SETTINGwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 51 --

1. Define the “What” & “Why” → What is the result you want to
achieve and why is it important?
2. Identify the “Who” → What resources will you need to
bring this to life? (internal or external)
3. Plan the “When” → Set a Target completion date
GOAL SETTINGwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 51 --

1. Define the “What” & “Why” → What is the result you want to
achieve and why is it important?
2. Identify the “Who” → What resources will you need to
bring this to life? (internal or external)
3. Plan the “When” → Set a Target completion date
4. Outline the “How” → What action items have to
happen along the way?
a. Owners
b. Time to Complete
c. Due Date
GOAL SETTINGwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 51 --

1. Define the “What” & “Why” → What is the result you want to
achieve and why is it important?
2. Identify the “Who” → What resources will you need to bring
this to life? (internal or external)
3. Plan the “When” → Set a Target completion date
4. Outline the “How” → What action items have to happen
along the way?
a. Owners
b. Time to Complete
c. Due Date
5. Identify Risks → What are potential roadblocks/delays?
GOAL SETTINGwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 51 --

1. Define the “What” & “Why” → What is the result you want to
achieve and why is it important?
2. Identify the “Who” → What resources will you need to bring
this to life? (internal or external)
3. Plan the “When” → Set a Target completion date
4. Outline the “How” → What key action items have to happen
along the way?
a. Owners
b. Time to Complete
c. Due Date
5. Identify Risks → What are potential roadblocks/delays?
6. Prioritize → How high of a priority is this for our business?
GOAL SETTINGwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 51 --

1. Define the “What” & “Why” → What is the result you want to
achieve and why is it important?
2. Identify the “Who” → What resources will you need to bring
this to life? (internal or external)
3. Plan the “When” → Set a Target completion date
4. Outline the “How” → What key action items have to happen
along the way?
a. Owners
b. Time to Complete
c. Due Date
5. Identify Risks → What are potential roadblocks/delays?
6. Prioritize → How high of a priority is this for our business?
7. Revisit Target Completion Date!! → Is this really feasible?!
GOAL SETTINGwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

SET PRIORITIES

-- 23 of 51 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 51 --

PRIORITY 	GOAL 	TARGET COMPLETION
DATE
2 	GOAL 1 	1/30/19
4 	GOAL 2 	2/15/19
1 	GOAL 3 	3/1/19
3 	GOAL 4 	3/31/19
ETC. 	ETC. 	ETC.
REMEMBER:
● Target completion date does not equal priority
● Priority defines resource allocation (people, time, attention)
● Priorities can/will change
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 51 --

ACCOUNTABILITY
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 51 --

1. Collaboration → Include key stakeholders in the goal
setting process
ACCOUNTABILITYwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 51 --

1. Collaboration → Include key stakeholders in the goal
setting process
2. Delegate → You cannot own everything. You will fail.
a. Hand over control
b. Edify your team
c. Allow your team to “own it” - Both wins & fails
d. Encourage collaboration without you
ACCOUNTABILITYwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 51 --

1. Collaboration → Include key stakeholders in the goal
setting process
2. Delegate → You cannot own everything. You will fail.
a. Hand over control
b. Edify your team
c. Allow your team to “own it” - Both wins & fails
d. Encourage collaboration without you
3. Progress Reports → Weekly check ins to see how things
are progressing (either meeting or EOW report)
a. Weekly Leadership Check-ins → Updates
ACCOUNTABILITYwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 51 --

1. Not a strong or clear enough “why?
2. Lack of resources
3. Unclear priorities
4. Goal was not ‘SMART’
a. Specific
b. Measureable
c. Achievable
d. Relevant
e. Time-Bound
5. Fear of change
COMMON REASONS FOR FAILUREwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 51 --

COMMUNICATING
CHANGE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 51 --

WHYYYYY is change so
hard!?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 51 --

...Because the status quo is
comfortable.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 51 --

...And humans naturally
avoid discomfort.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 51 --

Therefore:
Humans naturally avoid
change.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 51 --

“Big things happen when
you do the little things right.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 51 --

The 5 Ws
● WHAT
● WHY
● WHO
● WHEN
● WHERE
These reflect the most
basic questions people
have about how the
change will affect them.
Proactively answering
these in writing will help
the process go much
smoother!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 37 of 51 --

WHAT
What exactly is changing?
Are we moving locations?
Are we reorganizing?
Are we changing pricing?
Make this as clear and to the point as
possible.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 51 --

WHY
Why do we have to change?
What problem is this change solving?
Why is this a benefit to the audience?
It’s important to stop and think about your target audience
before addressing this W.
Address this W with a clear message that resonates with
people being impacted by the change and to whom you
are communicating.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 51 --

WHO
Who is being impacted by the change, both
internally and externally?
Are all employees being affected similarly, or
are some specific groups being impacted
differently?
Remember to look at this from all avenues,
and bring others in for their perspective so as
not to miss anyone impacted
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 40 of 51 --

WHEN
When is the change going to occur? What is a
realistic timeline for this change to be
released?
This helps people to prepare, so that they aren’t caught
off guard by what’s happening.
If you don’t know exactly when the change will happen,
give an overall timeline of what you do know, with
expected dates for when the rest of the details will be
known and shared.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 41 of 51 --

WHERE
Where do we need to make updates?
Where do we communicate this?
Where can the audience find this & more
information?
Remember to think both internally and externally!
EX: Members FB Group, Employee Bulletin Board
Point “any questions or concerns” in a specific direction
so you’re not bombarded
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 42 of 51 --

9 times out of 10…
● You will find holes in your plan
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 43 of 51 --

9 times out of 10…
● You will find holes in your plan
● You will think of something awesome to add
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 44 of 51 --

9 times out of 10…
● You will find holes in your plan
● You will think of something awesome to add
● You will realize the “why” is missing or no
longer accurate
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 45 of 51 --

9 times out of 10…
● You will find holes in your plan
● You will think of something awesome to add
● You will realize the “why” is missing or no
longer accurate
● You will learn more about your employees &
customers by training yourself to think like
them
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 46 of 51 --

9 times out of 10…
● You will find holes in your plan
● You will think of something awesome to add
● You will realize the “why” is missing or no
longer accurate
● You will learn more about your employees &
customers by training yourself to think like
them
● You will experience less resistance to the
change
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 51 --

9 times out of 10…
● You will find holes in your plan
● You will think of something awesome to add
● You will realize the “why” is missing or no
longer accurate
● You will learn more about your employees &
customers by training yourself to think like
them
● You will experience less resistance to the
change
● You will save time and energy
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
